reviews.comment:
Atención regular. Somos socios del ACÁ , Preguntamos si había descuento del 5% en combustible y dijeron que si. Luego de cargar, cuando le doy la credencial me dice que no tienen sistema… Para que promocionan con carteleria y chalecos si no lo hacen???

(Translated by Google)
Average service. We're ACÁ members. We asked if there was a 5% discount on fuel, and they said yes. After filling up, when I gave them my ID, they told me they didn't have a system... Why do they advertise with signs and vests if they don't do it?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7801942086659808563/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCOTZMa0R3EAE

reviews.comment:
El Shop tiene muy poca mercadería y a precios que superan la media. Ojalá mejoren porque es una muy linda estación de combustibles de la ciudad de Jáchal.

(Translated by Google)
The shop has very little merchandise and the prices are above average. I hope they improve because it's a very nice gas station in the city of Jáchal.
